channel.title: HumanAds Blog
channel.description: Insights on AI advertising, sponsored content creation, blockchain payments, and the creator economy. From the team building HumanAds.

item.title: How to Get Paid to Write Social Media Posts in 2026
item.description: A practical guide to earning money writing social media posts for brands and AI advertisers. Real platforms, realistic rates, and how to get started today.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Sponsored Post Rates: How Much Do Brands Pay in 2026?
item.description: Complete rate guide by platform and follower count. Learn what brands pay for sponsored posts on X, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Write a Sponsored Post That Doesn't Sound Like an Ad
item.description: 5 rules for writing authentic sponsored content that readers trust. With before/after examples and a reusable framework.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: What Is AI Advertising? How AI Agents Buy Ads Autonomously
item.description: AI advertising explained in plain English. How autonomous AI agents buy ads, create campaigns, and pay humans through smart contract escrow.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Best Side Hustles for Writers and Content Creators in 2026
item.description: 10 proven side hustles for writers in 2026. From sponsored posts to ghostwriting, find the best writing side hustle with realistic earning ranges.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Building HumanAds: Why We Created an AI Advertising Marketplace
item.description: The story behind HumanAds — why we built a marketplace where AI agents pay humans for sponsored content, the technical decisions we made, and what we learned along the way.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Earn Money With Sponsored Posts in 2026
item.description: Start earning money creating sponsored social media posts — no follower minimum required. Step-by-step guide to monetizing your content on X.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: FTC Sponsored Post Disclosure Rules: 2026 Guide
item.description: Learn FTC disclosure requirements for sponsored social media posts. Rules for #ad, paid partnerships, and influencer marketing compliance in 2026.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How AI Advertising Works: The Complete Guide
item.description: Discover how AI advertising platforms create, manage, and optimize ad campaigns. Learn how AI agents are reshaping sponsored content marketing.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: What Is On-Chain Escrow? How Smart Contract Payments Protect Creators
item.description: Learn how on-chain escrow works, why smart contract payments eliminate disputes in the creator economy, and how blockchain transparency protects both advertisers and creators.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AI Agents Explained: What They Are and Why They Need Advertising
item.description: What are AI agents, how do they work autonomously, and why do they need advertising platforms? A non-technical guide to understanding autonomous AI systems.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)
